customer_gateway_id.description: ID of the customer gateway to establish the VPN connection with; must be a valid existing customer gateway ID.

enable_acceleration.description: Specifies whether acceleration is enabled for the VPN connection; must be supported by the VPN gateway.

local_ipv4_network_cidr.description: CIDR block for the local IPv4 network used in the VPN connection configuration. Must be in valid CIDR notation.

local_ipv6_network_cidr.description: Specifies the IPv6 CIDR block for the local network in the VPN connection. Must be in valid CIDR format.

outside_ip_address_type.description: Specifies the type of IP address used for the VPN connection's outside IP, either 'public' or 'private'.

preshared_key_storage.description: Defines the storage location for the pre-shared key used in the VPN connection; must be securely managed to ensure confidentiality.

remote_ipv4_network_cidr.description: Specifies the IPv4 CIDR block of the remote network to be accessed through the VPN connection.

remote_ipv6_network_cidr.description: Specifies the IPv6 CIDR block of the remote network to establish the VPN connection. Ensure the CIDR block is valid and routable.

static_routes_only.description: Indicates whether the VPN connection uses static routes exclusively. Set to true to disable dynamic routing.

tags.description: Specifies key-value pairs to categorize and organize the VPN connection, with a maximum of 50 tags.

transit_gateway_id.description: ID of the transit gateway to associate with the VPN connection; must be an existing transit gateway in the AWS account.

transport_transit_gateway_attachment_id.description: ID of the transit gateway attachment used for VPN connection transport; must be associated with the specified transit gateway.

tunnel1_dpd_timeout_action.description: Specifies the action to take when Dead Peer Detection (DPD) timeout occurs for tunnel 1; valid values are "Clear", "Restart", or "Hold".

tunnel1_dpd_timeout_seconds.description: Specifies the Dead Peer Detection (DPD) timeout period in seconds for Tunnel 1; must be a positive integer.

tunnel1_enable_tunnel_lifecycle_control.description: Indicates whether lifecycle control for the first VPN tunnel is enabled, allowing manual control over tunnel status.

tunnel1_ike_versions.description: Specifies the supported IKE versions for the first VPN tunnel; must align with the VPN gateway configuration.

tunnel1_inside_cidr.description: CIDR block for the inside IP range of the first VPN tunnel; must be a valid IPv4 CIDR and non-overlapping with the VPC CIDR.

tunnel1_inside_ipv6_cidr.description: IPv6 CIDR block for the inside IP range of the first VPN tunnel; must be a valid /64 IPv6 CIDR.

tunnel1_log_options.description: Configuration options for logging tunnel 1 activity, including parameters for log destination and log format.

tunnel1_phase1_dh_group_numbers.description: Specifies the Diffie-Hellman group numbers for phase 1 of the first VPN tunnel; must be a list of valid group numbers supported by the VPN connection.

tunnel1_phase1_encryption_algorithms.description: Specifies the encryption algorithms used for Phase 1 in the first VPN tunnel; must match the supported algorithms of the customer gateway.

tunnel1_phase1_integrity_algorithms.description: Specifies the integrity algorithms used for phase 1 in tunnel 1 of the VPN connection. Must match the settings configured on the customer gateway.

tunnel1_phase1_lifetime_seconds.description: Defines the lifetime in seconds for the first phase of IKE negotiations for Tunnel 1, ranging between 900 and 28,800 seconds.

tunnel1_phase2_dh_group_numbers.description: Specifies the Diffie-Hellman group numbers for phase 2 of the first VPN tunnel; must be a list of valid group numbers supported by AWS.

tunnel1_phase2_encryption_algorithms.description: Specifies the encryption algorithms for Phase 2 of the first VPN tunnel, ensuring data confidentiality during transmission.

tunnel1_phase2_integrity_algorithms.description: Specifies the integrity algorithms used for Phase 2 of Tunnel 1. Must be supported by the VPN device.

tunnel1_phase2_lifetime_seconds.description: Specifies the lifetime in seconds for the first tunnel's phase 2 encryption, must be between 3600 and 604800.

tunnel1_preshared_key.description: Preshared key for authentication on the first VPN tunnel; must be a string between 8 and 64 characters.

tunnel1_rekey_fuzz_percentage.description: Percentage of phase 2 lifetime to allow for rekeying before the tunnel expires. Must be an integer between 0 and 100.

tunnel1_rekey_margin_time_seconds.description: Specifies the time in seconds before a tunnel's rekey margin time is reached, triggering negotiation of a new security association. Must be less than the tunnel's lifetime.

tunnel1_replay_window_size.description: Defines the maximum number of packets that can be replayed for tunnel 1, ensuring protection against replay attacks. Valid values range from 64 to 2048.

tunnel1_startup_action.description: Specifies the action to take when Tunnel 1 starts, such as enabling or disabling the tunnel. Must be set to a valid startup action.

tunnel2_dpd_timeout_action.description: Specifies the action to take when a Dead Peer Detection (DPD) timeout occurs for the second VPN tunnel.

tunnel2_dpd_timeout_seconds.description: Specifies the timeout in seconds for Dead Peer Detection (DPD) on the second VPN tunnel; must be greater than or equal to the DPD timeout action interval.

tunnel2_enable_tunnel_lifecycle_control.description: Controls the lifecycle management of the second VPN tunnel; set to true to enable manual control or false for automatic management.

tunnel2_ike_versions.description: Specifies the supported IKE versions for the second VPN tunnel; valid values are 1 and 2.

tunnel2_inside_cidr.description: CIDR block for the inside IP address range of the second VPN tunnel; must be within the allowed private IP ranges.

tunnel2_inside_ipv6_cidr.description: Specifies the IPv6 CIDR block for the second VPN tunnel's inside network; must be a /126 range.

tunnel2_log_options.description: Defines logging options for the second VPN tunnel, specifying configurations for monitoring and troubleshooting.

tunnel2_phase1_dh_group_numbers.description: Specifies the Diffie-Hellman group numbers for phase 1 of the second VPN tunnel; must be supported by the VPN device.

tunnel2_phase1_encryption_algorithms.description: Defines the encryption algorithms for Phase 1 of Tunnel 2 during VPN connection setup; must be supported by both sides of the VPN.

tunnel2_phase1_integrity_algorithms.description: Defines the integrity algorithms used in Phase 1 for Tunnel 2 during VPN connection setup; must be supported by both ends of the connection.

tunnel2_phase1_lifetime_seconds.description: Defines the lifetime of the IKE phase 1 tunnel in seconds for the second VPN tunnel, with a valid range of 900 to 28,800 seconds.

tunnel2_phase2_dh_group_numbers.description: Specifies the Diffie-Hellman group numbers for phase 2 of the second VPN tunnel, required for encryption key exchange.

tunnel2_phase2_encryption_algorithms.description: Defines the encryption algorithms for phase 2 of the second VPN tunnel; must be supported by both ends of the connection.

tunnel2_phase2_integrity_algorithms.description: Defines the integrity algorithms used for phase 2 of the second VPN tunnel; must match the configuration of the on-premises VPN device.

tunnel2_phase2_lifetime_seconds.description: Defines the lifetime of phase 2 security associations for the second VPN tunnel, in seconds. Must be between 180 and 3600.

tunnel2_preshared_key.description: Pre-shared key for the second VPN tunnel, required for authentication and must be between 8 and 64 characters.

tunnel2_rekey_fuzz_percentage.description: Percentage of the lifetime for Phase 2 rekey fuzzing in the second VPN tunnel, used to randomize rekey timing. Must be between 0 and 100.

tunnel2_rekey_margin_time_seconds.description: Specifies the time in seconds before the tunnel's rekey margin period ends, during which a new key negotiation should occur. Must be less than the lifetime of the tunnel.

tunnel2_replay_window_size.description: Defines the maximum number of packets that can be replayed for the second VPN tunnel. Must be a positive integer.

tunnel2_startup_action.description: Specifies the action to perform when the second VPN tunnel starts; must be either "start" or "stop".

tunnel_inside_ip_version.description: Specifies the IP version (IPv4 or IPv6) for the inside tunnel traffic of the VPN connection.

type.description: Specifies the type of VPN connection, such as "ipsec.1".

vpn_gateway_id.description: ID of the VPN gateway to which the VPN connection will be attached; must be an existing gateway in the same region.
